folio.label: 76v
folio.l: In the olde dayes , of kyngö Arthour
Of whicú that Bretons speken , gret honour
Al was this lond , fulfilled of fairie
The Elf Quene , witú hire ioly companye
Daunced ful ofte , in many a grene mede
This was the olde oppynyouö , as I rede
I speke of manye , hundred ©eres a go
But now can noman , se noone Elues moo
For now the gret charite , and preyeres
Of lymytours , and othere holy Freres
That serchen euäry lond , and euäy streme
As thikke as motes , in the Sonne beme
This maketú that there ben , no fayeries
For there as wont , to walken was an Elf
There walketú now , the lymytour hi~ self
